knownIssues.symptom: dry-run passes but platform returns category_id is not valid or product category remains unselected in edit page
knownIssues.cause: payload categoryId was patched, but product edit state did not persist category selection
knownIssues.currentMitigation: use op=1 completion save before op=2 publish and verify categoryState in report

knownIssues.symptom: Brand Name, High-concerned chemical, Origin appear empty in edit page
knownIssues.cause: productPropertyListJson exists only in constructed payload, not in saved product state
knownIssues.currentMitigation: op=1 completion save must persist productPropertyListJson

knownIssues.symptom: United States is not checked in variation parameters and publish fails
knownIssues.cause: optionValues and variationListStr are not both persisted to product state
knownIssues.currentMitigation: ensure optionValues.发货地 and skuPropertyListJson both contain United States before op=2

knownIssues.symptom: V2 detector sometimes records click but not userscript save.json request
knownIssues.cause: Tampermonkey execution context may bypass page hook
knownIssues.currentMitigation: merged plugin records its own API calls in reports

knownIssues.symptom: op=1 returns code -1: 产品保存成功，移入待发布失败：只有采集箱中的产品才能移入待发布！
knownIssues.cause: Product is already in dxmState=offline and dxmOfflineState=waitPublish, so collection-box op=1 cannot move it to waitPublish again.
knownIssues.currentMitigation: merged plugin v1.1.4 blocks dry-run for waitPublish/publishFail products in the main collection-box flow; use a true draft product, or capture page-save payload for waitPublish as a separate schema.

knownIssues.symptom: Plugin reads a waitPublish product while the user is on the collection-box page.
knownIssues.cause: The old candidate-state detector scanned full page text; the sidebar always contains 待发布产品, so waitPublish pageList candidates were tried before draft candidates.
knownIssues.currentMitigation: merged plugin v1.1.5 reads draft candidates only for the main collection-box flow; non-draft states must be handled by manual ID or a separate schema-learning flow.

knownIssues.symptom: After clicking op=1, the product moves to waitPublish, but the waitPublish edit page still has blank value/freight/stock/SKU/weight/dimensions fields.
knownIssues.cause: op=1 is a move-to-waitPublish flow, not the intermediate edit-page save needed to persist all required fields before publishing.
knownIssues.currentMitigation: merged plugin v1.1.6 disables op=1 as completion save; next step is to capture the real edit-page save payload with save Payload V3.

knownIssues.symptom: Stability run enters the edit page but save or move-to-waitPublish fails because product category is blank and imported custom attributes exceed platform limits.
knownIssues.cause: Visible edit-page rules rewrote title, description and freight template, but did not hard-preflight the visible product category or clear imported custom attributes before saving.
knownIssues.currentMitigation: merged plugin v1.1.37 adds visible category selection, required attribute defaults, custom attribute cleanup, template verification, preflight save, and one retry after fixable validation errors.

knownIssues.symptom: Browser / Computer Use can read Chrome tabs or windows, but Dianxiaomi deep page operations such as evaluate, domSnapshot, screenshot, reload, or goto time out or stop because the current browser URL cannot be confirmed.
knownIssues.cause: Environment control channel cannot reliably operate the Dianxiaomi page in the current Windows browser session.
knownIssues.currentMitigation: Classify as Environment Control Exception; do not count as business, plugin, project, or product failure; stop repeated deep browser recovery attempts and resume validation in the Mac environment.
